prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library, warm wood textures; Natsu Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, and Natsu Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes, stand together raising their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice; soft glowing mana ribbons swirl between them, readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
